task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `useGlobalPaneShortcuts` so the Opt+Shift+W path peeks the React Query cache with `queryClient.getQueryData(queryKeys.settings.tool(videoEditorSettings.id, selectedProjectId ?? undefined, undefined))` and unwraps the cached settings via `extractSettingsFromCache` without triggering a fetch. When the cached project settings contain `lastTimelineId`, the shortcut now navigates to `/tools/video-editor?timeline=<id>`; otherwise it preserves the existing bare `/tools/video-editor` navigation. Verified the hook still type-checks with `npm exec tsc -- --noEmit`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed `useGlobalPaneShortcuts.ts` now uses `queryClient.getQueryData` with the same `queryKeys.settings.tool(videoEditorSettings.id, selectedProjectId ?? undefined, undefined)` key shape as `useToolSettings`, appends `?timeline=<id>` only when cached settings expose `lastTimelineId`, and otherwise falls back to `/tools/video-editor`.
